content:
# Combined LUT + CUDA 3D Texture — Implementation Plan Record

GitHub issue: chunzhe10/dorea#28
Plan file: `repos/dorea/docs/plans/2026-04-03-combined-lut-cuda-texture-plan.md`

## 10-task breakdown

| Task | What |
|------|------|
| 1 | Capture CPU regression baseline test |
| 2 | Hard-delete clarity (clarity.cu, build.rs, cpu.rs finish_grade, lib.rs) |
| 3 | Add grade_pixel_cpu() single-pixel Rust reference function |
| 4 | Write grade_pixel.cuh (LAB colorspace, trilinear, HSL, ambiance, warmth, blend) |
| 5 | Write build_combined_lut.cu + update build.rs |
| 6 | Write CombinedLut Rust struct (cuArray3DCreate, cuMemcpy3D, cuTexObjectCreate) |
| 7 | Write combined_lut.cu + update build.rs |
| 8 | Wire CombinedLut into CudaGrader (new API, simplified grade_frame_cuda → Vec<u8>) |
| 9 | Update public API (lib.rs, grade.rs, bench) |
| 10 | Integration accuracy test (≤2/255) + criterion benchmark |

## Critical implementation details

- grade_pixel.cuh must match fused_ambiance_warmth() in cpu.rs exactly (all constants, formula order)
- cuMemcpy3D CUDA_MEMCPY3D srcPitch = N × 4 × sizeof(float) = N × 16 bytes for float4
- combined_lut.cu samples with normalized coords — texel center alignment at [0,1] range
- Texture handles (CUtexObject = u64) uploaded to device memory, passed as const u64* to kernel
- CudaGrader::new() now requires calibration+params; grade_frame_cuda() returns Vec<u8> not Vec<f32>
- 5-persona review pending at time of this write — plan may be revised based on findings
